metadata.name: In house Recruiting Directions
metadata.value:
1)First PI and Codility test , should score more than 75% before moving to HM review 
2) Resumes will be tagged to Glen Fernandes and Pavel Tolkachev for initial review.
3) First interview - Pavel Tolkachev and Glen Fernandes
4) Final Interview – Anthony Antonucci and Konstantine

title: Software Developer - C++
